title: Journey of the Childmen: The Mighty Boosh on Tour
original_title: The Mighty Boosh: Journey of the Childmen
overview: Shot during the mammoth Future Sailors tour, this intimate film observes the comic genius of the Mighty Boosh as they navigate a nation hooked on its cult.
